events.name: Perseid Meteor Shower
events.description: One of the best annual meteor showers, producing up to 100 meteors per hour at peak.

events.name: Total Lunar Eclipse
events.description: The Moon passes completely through Earth's umbral shadow, turning a deep red.

events.name: Full Moon
events.description: The Moon is fully illuminated as seen from Earth.

events.name: Mars at Opposition
events.description: Mars reaches opposition, its closest approach to Earth this year.

events.name: Milky Way Season Peak
events.description: The galactic core is at its highest point; best conditions for dark-sky photography.

events.name: Geminid Meteor Shower
events.description: Prolific shower producing up to 120 multi-coloured meteors per hour.
